metadata.description: Weapon type catalog with base stats and traits
metadata.usage: Base catalog of weapons with inherent stats and traits. Each item has individual properties. Type-level traits apply to all items in category.
notes: Base items used in pattern generation with names.json
Each weapon has damage, weight, value, rarity, and selectionWeight
Type-level traits (damageType, slot, category) apply to all items in that weapon type
skillReference uses JSON v4.1 reference format to link to skills
v4.2: Reorganized weapon_types to match skill categories

items.name: Blade
items.description: A simple blade suitable for basic combat.

items.name: Shortsword
items.description: A basic blade shorter than a longsword but more agile.

items.name: Longsword
items.description: A versatile blade forged for balance and precision, favored by warriors who value technique over brute force.

items.name: Greatsword
items.description: A massive two-handed blade capable of cleaving through armor and bone with devastating force.

items.name: Katana
items.description: A curved blade of exceptional craftsmanship, designed for swift, lethal strikes with a single edge.

items.name: Broadsword
items.description: A wide, sturdy blade built for powerful slashing attacks and reliable defense.

items.name: Claymore
items.description: A massive highland sword wielded with both hands, delivering crushing overhead strikes.

items.name: Saber
items.description: A curved cavalry sword designed for slashing attacks from horseback or in close combat.

items.name: Dagger
items.description: A chipped blade with a cracked handle, more useful as a tool than a weapon.

items.name: Dagger
items.description: A simple blade for quick strikes and concealment.

items.name: Shortsword
items.description: A compact blade favored for its maneuverability in tight spaces and quick strikes.

items.name: Scimitar
items.description: A gracefully curved blade hailing from desert lands, deadly in the hands of a skilled warrior.

items.name: Rapier
items.description: An elegant thrusting sword designed for precision strikes and refined swordsmanship.

items.name: Gladius
items.description: A short Roman sword built for brutal efficiency in close-quarters combat.

items.name: Dagger
items.description: A small blade easily concealed, lethal in the hands of an assassin or when thrown.

items.name: Dirk
items.description: A long dagger with a straight blade, traditional among highland warriors and scouts.

items.name: Stiletto
items.description: A thin, needle-like blade designed to pierce through gaps in armor.

items.name: Kris
items.description: A wavy-bladed dagger with mystical significance, said to hold spiritual power.

items.name: Tanto
items.description: A short blade traditionally paired with a katana, ideal for close combat.

items.name: Kukri
items.description: A curved blade from mountain regions, equally useful as tool and weapon.

items.name: Rondel
items.description: A stiff-bladed dagger with a sharp point, designed to puncture armor joints.

items.name: Main Gauche
items.description: A parrying dagger used in the off-hand for defensive maneuvers.

items.name: Battleaxe
items.description: A heavy chopping weapon that combines raw power with tactical versatility.

items.name: Handaxe
items.description: A compact axe easily wielded or thrown, useful both in combat and utility.

items.name: Greataxe
items.description: A massive two-handed axe capable of splitting shields and skulls with a single blow.

items.name: Waraxe
items.description: A formidable axe designed specifically for warfare, balancing power and control.

items.name: Hatchet
items.description: A small utility axe that doubles as an effective throwing weapon.

items.name: Tomahawk
items.description: A light throwing axe used by tribal warriors, deadly at range or in melee.

items.name: Cleaver
items.description: A heavy chopping blade, originally a butcher's tool, repurposed for brutal combat.

items.name: Poleaxe
items.description: A pole-mounted axe head combined with other striking surfaces for maximum versatility.

items.name: Longbow
items.description: A tall bow requiring strength to draw, capable of impressive range and penetration.

items.name: Shortbow
items.description: A compact bow favored by scouts and hunters for its portability and ease of use.

items.name: Composite Bow
items.description: A sophisticated bow made from multiple materials, offering superior power and accuracy.

items.name: Recurve Bow
items.description: A bow with curved tips that stores more energy, delivering faster and more powerful shots.

items.name: Crossbow
items.description: A mechanical bow that trades firing speed for raw power and ease of aim.

items.name: Heavy Crossbow
items.description: A massive crossbow capable of punching through heavy armor at considerable range.

items.name: Warbow
items.description: A powerful military bow designed to pierce armor, requiring exceptional strength to draw.

items.name: Hunting Bow
items.description: A lightweight bow designed for hunting game, reliable and easy to maintain.

items.name: Spear
items.description: A versatile weapon consisting of a pointed blade on a shaft, effective at keeping enemies at bay.

items.name: Lance
items.description: A long cavalry weapon designed for devastating charges, unwieldy on foot.

items.name: Javelin
items.description: A light throwing spear that can also be used in melee, favored by skirmishers.

items.name: Pike
items.description: An extremely long spear used in formations, presenting a wall of points to cavalry and infantry.

items.name: Halberd
items.description: A pole weapon combining an axe blade, spike, and hook for maximum versatility.

items.name: Trident
items.description: A three-pronged spear associated with sea gods, deadly for thrusting attacks.

items.name: Partisan
items.description: An ornate pole weapon with a broad blade and side projections, favored by guards.

items.name: Glaive
items.description: A pole weapon with a single-edged blade, combining reach with slashing power.

items.name: Club
items.description: A crude bludgeon carved from a sturdy branch, effective despite its simplicity.

items.name: Club
items.description: A solid wooden weapon reinforced with metal studs.

items.name: Mace
items.description: A heavy metal club designed to crush armor and bones with brutal efficiency.

items.name: Warhammer
items.description: A balanced hammer built for war, capable of denting the heaviest armor.

items.name: Flail
items.description: A hinged weapon with a spiked head on a chain, difficult to defend against.

items.name: Morning Star
items.description: A spiked mace designed to penetrate armor and cause devastating wounds.

items.name: Club
items.description: A simple wooden bludgeon, crude but effective in untrained hands.

items.name: Maul
items.description: A massive two-handed hammer that can shatter shields and pulverize armor.

items.name: Cudgel
items.description: A thick stick or light club, the weapon of choice for tavern brawlers and thugs.

items.name: Scepter
items.description: An ornamental rod that can serve as a weapon when magic is not enough.

items.name: Staff
items.description: A wooden pole often used by travelers and mages as both walking aid and weapon.

items.name: Quarterstaff
items.description: A sturdy wooden staff wielded with both hands, offering reach and defensive capability.

items.name: War Staff
items.description: A reinforced staff designed for combat, often capped with metal for extra striking power.

items.name: Battle Staff
items.description: A heavy combat staff capable of breaking bones and deflecting sword strikes.

items.name: Rod
items.description: A short metal rod infused with magical energy, serving as both focus and weapon.

items.name: Scepter Staff
items.description: An ornate staff that channels magical power while serving as a symbol of authority.
